result:
**Infrastructure: 15 services, 6 environments**

IDs: API Q7KJPHFB, cron F76UY394, S3 42S49WY4, DB PE4CWYWY, rollback 86RDGGAX, queue 5HBBS363, registry 3CNSYPKY, incident QYRPCFU4, SSH E8C5GA5T, VPN YRR7ZJMT, flag 9FRBX6YW, artifact XUUZB5G7, license 7J6PJQJX, TLS 6YRRHWJN, nonce 9BRT6YGW, dashboard V7MEYQYJ.

Services (15): scheduler-core, export-pipeline, cache-warmer, billing-worker, session-manager, auth-service, notification-daemon, ingest-api, metrics-collector, webhook-relay, search-indexer, user-profile-service, payment-gateway, report-builder, audit-logger.

Environments (6): green/blue pools, staging, production, dev sandbox, QA cluster, canary.

Status: 80+ operations executed (restart, patch, scale, drain, reconfigure, redeploy, rollback, migrate, health-check, resume, pause, downgrade, upgrade). Common outcomes: alerts cleared, error rates stabilized, memory/latency normalized. Most completed successfully or recovered after brief stalls. Logs archived; postmortem notes added; follow-up tasks filed. No customer impact; pager remained quiet.
